headline: How Investors Are Reacting To S&P Global (SPGI) Expanding Private Markets Data And Tech Leadership
summary: On 31 March 2026, S&P Global launched its first S&P Global, Cambridge Associates, Mercer Private Markets Performance Analytics datasets for private credit and real assets, and appointed Firdaus Bhathena as Executive Vice President and Chief Technology and Transformation Officer effective 27 April 2026. The combination of new private markets datasets powered by S&P Global’s iLEVEL platform and a unified technology leadership role underscores the company’s push to deepen its data offering and...

headline: Axos Bank Named a Top 5 Public Bank for 2025
summary: SAN DIEGO, April 01, 2026--Axos Bank, the nationwide bank subsidiary of Axos Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AX), was named the 4th-highest performing publicly traded bank in 2025 by S&P Global.
